mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qp_snapshot_intervention_sentence (snapshot_id, source_rule_id, source_text, target_text, match_type, priority, enabled, remark, created_at) SELECT #{snapshotId}, id, source_text, target_text, match_type, priority, enabled, remark, NOW() FROM qp_rule_intervention_sentence WHERE resource_set_id = #{resourceSetId}

INSERT INTO qp_rule_intervention_sentence (resource_set_id, source_text, target_text, match_type, priority, enabled, remark, created_at, updated_at) SELECT #{resourceSetId}, source_text, target_text, match_type, priority, enabled, remark, NOW(), NOW() FROM qp_snapshot_intervention_sentence WHERE snapshot_id = #{snapshotId}
